records.ety: [Cf. Gael. duileasg; duille leaf + uisge water. Cf. Whisky.]

defs: A seaweed of a reddish brown color, which is sometimes eaten, as in Scotland. The true dulse is Sarcophyllis edulis; the common is Rhodymenia. [Written also dillisk.]
quotes: The crimson leaf of the dulse is seen To blush like a banner bathed in slaughter.
